hero.pitch: OPS CORPORATION designs, deploys, and secures your infrastructure and web applications — from the network layer to the user interface.

skills.label: Technical Expertise
skills.title: Core skills
skills.subtitle: Dual focus on systems / networks and web development, with reliability and security in mind.

soc.title: Mini-SOC & monitoring
soc.desc: Set up a mini-SOC, centralized event collection, and incident handling to improve visibility and MTTR.

backbone.title: Local backbone and relays
backbone.desc: Multi-site secure network rollout with relays and logical segmentation of flows (QoS / VLAN).

portal.title: Web portals (Next.js)
portal.desc: Built a client portal and back-office with a Node API, authentication and roles, and a modern UI.

managed.title: Managed services & support
managed.desc: Proactive monitoring, maintenance, and user support to keep your systems available and performing.

deployment.title: Deployment & monitoring
deployment.desc: Installation, configuration, and observability for your server and network infrastructure.

security.title: Security & SOC
security.desc: Strengthen your defenses, detect threats, and respond to security incidents effectively.

webapps.title: Custom web apps
webapps.desc: Modern, performant, and maintainable applications — from API to user interface.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's talk about your project.
contact.pitch: Describe your need — we'll get back to you within 24 hours with a tailored proposal.
